rationale: Surface: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy in `inner_work`. The function itself has no `capable()` gate — in-function axis-4 stays silent. But `inner_work` is `static` and its only caller (`ioctl_entry`) has `capable(CAP_SYS_ADMIN)` gating. 1-hop back-walk via PR-4 prereqs sees all callers gated → NOT_EXPLOITABLE (CAP_SYS_ADMIN-equivalent attacker can already do equivalent harm).
